name: lean4
description: Unified Lean 4 plugin (draft, formalize, autoformalize, prove, autoprove, disprove, checkpoint, review, refactor, golf, learn, doctor) — LSP-first, scripts fallback

interface.shortDescription: Structured Lean 4 proving workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Lean 4 and mathlib workflows for drafting, proving, refuting, reviewing, refactoring, golfing, and diagnosing formalizations.
defaultPrompt: Use $lean4 to prove this theorem with explicit validation.
Use $lean4 to review this Lean proof and suggest refactors.
Use $lean4 to diagnose these Lean build errors.
